UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY CO. HENRY RANDALL BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,104.00
